scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend-superadmin install && npm --prefix frontend-admin install && npm --prefix frontend-user install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:superadmin" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:user"
scripts.build: npm run build:superadmin && npm run build:admin && npm run build:user
